name: catalog_sales_net_profit
description: Regressor that fits catalog-sale net profit from paid amount, wholesale cost, and shipping cost.
comment: Structured monetary regression over catalog-sales measures where the target is not passed as an input.

name: catalog_sales_net_paid
description: Three-input regressor that fits net paid from extended sales price, discount amount, and tax.
comment: Included as a structured arithmetic regression task over standard TPC-DS catalog-sales measures, where the target should be closely determined by the provided monetary inputs.

name: catalog_sales_ship_mode_classifier
description: Proxy-label classifier that predicts whether the sale used a low, medium, or high ship-mode key range from order attributes and shipping cost.
comment: Kept as a coarse proxy-label benchmark rather than a deterministic rule: the target is a broad ship-mode bucket, not the exact ship mode key.
target_expression: CASE WHEN cs_ship_mode_sk < 7 THEN 0 WHEN cs_ship_mode_sk < 14 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
